proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (higher age_years) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
The objective_response rate differs between sex_female=1 and sex_female=0 patients.
Patients with secondary_aml=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with secondary_aml=0.
Patients flagged unfit_for_intensive=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with unfit_for_intensive=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean age: 68.0 responders vs 68.0 non-responders (Welch t-test).
Logistic: 1-unit increase in ECOG PS multiplies odds of response by 0.703.
Response rate female 0.189 vs male 0.186 (chi2 OR=1.019).
Response: secondary AML 0.188 vs de novo 0.187 (OR=1.005).
Response: unfit 0.221 vs fit 0.165 (OR=1.435).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with complex_karyotype=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with complex_karyotype=0.
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with tp53_mutation=0.
Patients with npm1_mutation=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients with npm1_mutation=0.
Patients with flt3_itd=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with flt3_itd=0.
Patients with flt3_tkd=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with flt3_tkd=0.
Patients with idh1_mutation=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with idh1_mutation=0.
Patients with idh2_mutation=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with idh2_mutation=0.

idh1_mutation=1 response 0.191 vs =0 0.187 (chi2 OR=1.025).
idh2_mutation=1 response 0.191 vs =0 0.187 (chi2 OR=1.029).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Receiving treatment_midostaurin=1 is associated with higher overall objective_response than treatment_midostaurin=0.
Receiving treatment_gilteritinib=1 is associated with higher overall objective_response than treatment_gilteritinib=0.
Receiving treatment_ivosidenib=1 is associated with higher overall objective_response than treatment_ivosidenib=0.
Receiving treatment_enasidenib=1 is associated with higher overall objective_response than treatment_enasidenib=0.
Receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1 is associated with higher overall objective_response than treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.
Receiving treatment_7plus3=1 is associated with higher overall objective_response than treatment_7plus3=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher wbc_k_per_ul is associated with a lower objective_response rate.
Higher blast_pct_marrow is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response rate.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response rate.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Higher ast_u_l is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Higher alt_u_l is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher bun_mg_dl is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Lower sodium_meq_l is associated with lower objective_response rate (i.e., higher sodium = higher response).
potassium_meq_l is associated with objective_response rate.
calcium_mg_dl is associated with objective_response rate.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable logistic adjustment for demographics, fitness, mutations and labs, treatment_midostaurin is independently associated with higher objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_gilteritinib is independently associated with higher objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_ivosidenib is independently associated with higher objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_enasidenib is independently associated with higher objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is independently associated with higher objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_7plus3 is independently associated with higher objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted logistic OR for treatment_midostaurin: 0.987 (p=0.696).
Adjusted logistic OR for treatment_gilteritinib: 0.952 (p=0.136).
Adjusted logistic OR for treatment_ivosidenib: 1.012 (p=0.79).
Adjusted logistic OR for treatment_enasidenib: 0.987 (p=0.761).
Adjusted logistic OR for treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine: 1.431 (p=4.83e-53).
Adjusted logistic OR for treatment_7plus3: 1.015 (p=0.522).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_midostaurin and flt3_itd: midostaurin's effect on objective_response is larger in flt3_itd=1 than in flt3_itd=0.
Within flt3_itd=1, treatment_midostaurin=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_midostaurin=0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_midostaurin and flt3_tkd: midostaurin's effect is larger in flt3_tkd=1 than in flt3_tkd=0.
Within flt3_tkd=1, treatment_midostaurin=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_midostaurin=0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_gilteritinib and flt3_itd: gilteritinib's effect is larger in flt3_itd=1 than in flt3_itd=0.
Within flt3_itd=1, treatment_gilteritinib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_gilteritinib=0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_gilteritinib and flt3_tkd: gilteritinib's effect is larger in flt3_tkd=1 than in flt3_tkd=0.
Within flt3_tkd=1, treatment_gilteritinib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_gilteritinib=0.

analyses.result_summary: Logit interaction treatment_midostaurin*flt3_itd: coef=-0.106 (OR=0.899).
Stratified response: flt3_itd=0: on=0.188 off=0.187 (Δ=+0.001); flt3_itd=1: on=0.176 off=0.191 (Δ=-0.015). Within flt3_itd=1: chi2 OR=0.905, p=0.188.
Logit interaction treatment_midostaurin*flt3_tkd: coef=-0.023 (OR=0.977).
Stratified response: flt3_tkd=0: on=0.186 off=0.188 (Δ=-0.002); flt3_tkd=1: on=0.176 off=0.181 (Δ=-0.005). Within flt3_tkd=1: chi2 OR=0.965, p=0.846.
Logit interaction treatment_gilteritinib*flt3_itd: coef=0.079 (OR=1.082).
Stratified response: flt3_itd=0: on=0.179 off=0.189 (Δ=-0.010); flt3_itd=1: on=0.191 off=0.189 (Δ=+0.002). Within flt3_itd=1: chi2 OR=1.015, p=0.863.
Logit interaction treatment_gilteritinib*flt3_tkd: coef=-0.213 (OR=0.808).
Stratified response: flt3_tkd=0: on=0.183 off=0.189 (Δ=-0.006); flt3_tkd=1: on=0.151 off=0.186 (Δ=-0.035). Within flt3_tkd=1: chi2 OR=0.778, p=0.1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_ivosidenib and idh1_mutation: ivosidenib's effect is larger in idh1_mutation=1 than in idh1_mutation=0.
Within idh1_mutation=1, treatment_ivosidenib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_ivosidenib=0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_ivosidenib and idh2_mutation (cross-target activity).
Within idh2_mutation=1, treatment_ivosidenib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_ivosidenib=0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_enasidenib and idh2_mutation: enasidenib's effect is larger in idh2_mutation=1 than in idh2_mutation=0.
Within idh2_mutation=1, treatment_enasidenib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_enasidenib=0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_enasidenib and idh1_mutation (cross-target activity).
Within idh1_mutation=1, treatment_enasidenib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_enasidenib=0.

analyses.result_summary: Logit interaction treatment_ivosidenib*idh1_mutation: coef=-0.304 (OR=0.738).
Stratified: idh1_mutation=0 Δ=+0.004 (n_on=3640); idh1_mutation=1 Δ=-0.040 (n_on=298). Within idh1_mutation=1: OR=0.757, p=0.11.
Logit interaction treatment_ivosidenib*idh2_mutation: coef=-0.019 (OR=0.981).
Stratified: idh2_mutation=0 Δ=+0.001 (n_on=3606); idh2_mutation=1 Δ=-0.002 (n_on=332). Within idh2_mutation=1: OR=0.988, p=0.991.
Logit interaction treatment_enasidenib*idh2_mutation: coef=0.039 (OR=1.040).
Stratified: idh2_mutation=0 Δ=-0.002 (n_on=3618); idh2_mutation=1 Δ=+0.004 (n_on=354). Within idh2_mutation=1: OR=1.024, p=0.92.
Logit interaction treatment_enasidenib*idh1_mutation: coef=0.091 (OR=1.095).
Stratified: idh1_mutation=0 Δ=-0.003 (n_on=3689); idh1_mutation=1 Δ=+0.011 (n_on=283). Within idh1_mutation=1: OR=1.075, p=0.698.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_7plus3 has a smaller (more-negative interaction) effect on objective_response in tp53_mutation=1 vs tp53_mutation=0 patients.
treatment_7plus3 has a smaller effect on objective_response in complex_karyotype=1 vs complex_karyotype=0 patients.
treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine has a smaller effect on objective_response in tp53_mutation=1 vs tp53_mutation=0 patients.
treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine has a smaller effect on objective_response in complex_karyotype=1 vs complex_karyotype=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_7plus3*tp53_mutation: int_coef=-0.045 (p=0.572); strat: tp53_mutation=0 Δ=+0.003, tp53_mutation=1 Δ=-0.003.
treatment_7plus3*complex_karyotype: int_coef=-0.213 (p=0.00151); strat: complex_karyotype=0 Δ=+0.007, complex_karyotype=1 Δ=-0.023.
treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine*tp53_mutation: int_coef=-0.409 (p=4.67e-07); strat: tp53_mutation=0 Δ=+0.060, tp53_mutation=1 Δ=-0.004.
treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine*complex_karyotype: int_coef=-0.306 (p=6e-06); strat: complex_karyotype=0 Δ=+0.061, complex_karyotype=1 Δ=+0.012.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_7plus3 has a larger positive effect on objective_response in unfit_for_intensive=0 (fit) vs unfit_for_intensive=1 patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_7plus3's effect on objective_response is larger in age_years<75 (age_ge75=0) than in age_ge75=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine*age>=75: int_coef=-0.063 (p=0.23); <75 Δ=+0.056, >=75 Δ=+0.046.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_7plus3's effect on objective_response is larger in ecog_ps<2 (ecog_ge2=0) than in ecog_ge2=1 patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within flt3_itd=1 patients, treatment_gilteritinib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_gilteritinib=0 (final restated).
Within flt3_itd=1 AND unfit_for_intensive=0 patients, treatment_midostaurin=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_midostaurin=0 (final restated).
Within idh1_mutation=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 patients, treatment_ivosidenib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_ivosidenib=0 (final restated).
Within idh2_mutation=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 patients, treatment_enasidenib=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_enasidenib=0 (final restated).

Within unfit_for_intensive=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0 (final restated).
Within unfit_for_intensive=0 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 patients, treatment_7plus3=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_7plus3=0 (final restated).

analyses.result_summary: Final: gilteritinib in FLT3-ITD (n=10000): on=0.191, off=0.189, Δ=+0.002 OR=1.015.
Final: midostaurin in FLT3-ITD & fit (n=5958): on=0.159, off=0.170, Δ=-0.010 OR=0.928.
Final: ivosidenib in IDH1-mut & TP53-wt & non-complex (n=2754): on=0.160, off=0.194, Δ=-0.034 OR=0.792.
Final: enasidenib in IDH2-mut & TP53-wt (n=4189): on=0.204, off=0.192, Δ=+0.012 OR=1.077.
Final: ven-aza in unfit & TP53-wt & non-complex (n=15328): on=0.349, off=0.162, Δ=+0.186 OR=2.761.
Final: 7+3 in fit & TP53-wt & non-complex (n=22993): on=0.170, off=0.161, Δ=+0.010 OR=1.073.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable logistic model fit only within flt3_itd=1 (adjusting for age_years, sex_female, ecog_ps, wbc_k_per_ul, blast_pct_marrow, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l), treatment_gilteritinib has positive log-odds for objective_response.
In a multivariable logistic model fit within flt3_itd=1 AND unfit_for_intensive=0 patients, treatment_midostaurin has positive log-odds for objective_response.
In a multivariable logistic model fit within idh1_mutation=1 patients, treatment_ivosidenib has positive log-odds for objective_response.
In a multivariable logistic model fit within idh2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_enasidenib has positive log-odds for objective_response.
In a multivariable logistic model fit within unfit_for_intensive=1 patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine has positive log-odds for objective_response.
In a multivariable logistic model fit within unfit_for_intensive=0 patients, treatment_7plus3 has positive log-odds for objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted logistic: treatment_gilteritinib within FLT3-ITD (n=10000): logOR=0.021 (OR=1.021), p=0.772.
Adjusted logistic: treatment_midostaurin within FLT3-ITD & fit (n=5958): logOR=-0.084 (OR=0.919), p=0.403.
Adjusted logistic: treatment_ivosidenib within IDH1-mut (n=3624): logOR=-0.283 (OR=0.754), p=0.091.
Adjusted logistic: treatment_enasidenib within IDH2-mut (n=4679): logOR=0.023 (OR=1.023), p=0.87.
Adjusted logistic: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine within unfit (n=20056): logOR=0.839 (OR=2.313), p=1.72e-128.
Adjusted logistic: treatment_7plus3 within fit (n=29944): logOR=0.026 (OR=1.027), p=0.401.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within flt3_itd=0 AND flt3_tkd=0 (FLT3-wt) patients, treatment_gilteritinib=1 does NOT produce a meaningful difference in objective_response vs treatment_gilteritinib=0 (negative control).
Within flt3_itd=0 AND flt3_tkd=0 (FLT3-wt) patients, treatment_midostaurin=1 does NOT produce a meaningful difference in objective_response vs treatment_midostaurin=0 (negative control).
Within idh1_mutation=0 patients, treatment_ivosidenib=1 does NOT produce a meaningful difference in objective_response vs treatment_ivosidenib=0 (negative control).
Within idh2_mutation=0 patients, treatment_enasidenib=1 does NOT produce a meaningful difference in objective_response vs treatment_enasidenib=0 (negative control).

analyses.result_summary: Gilteritinib in FLT3-wt (n=37185): on=0.181, off=0.189, Δ=-0.008 OR=0.950.
Midostaurin in FLT3-wt (n=37185): on=0.189, off=0.187, Δ=+0.002 OR=1.010.
Ivosidenib in IDH1-wt (n=46376): on=0.191, off=0.187, Δ=+0.004 OR=1.027.
Enasidenib in IDH2-wt (n=45321): on=0.185, off=0.187, Δ=-0.002 OR=0.984.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within npm1_mutation=1 AND unfit_for_intensive=0 patients, treatment_7plus3=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_7plus3=0.
Within npm1_mutation=0 AND unfit_for_intensive=0 patients, treatment_7plus3=1 produces higher objective_response than treatment_7plus3=0.
There is a non-zero interaction between treatment_midostaurin and treatment_7plus3 in their joint effect on objective_response.
There is a non-zero interaction between treatment_gilteritinib and treatment_7plus3 in their joint effect on objective_response.
There is a non-zero interaction between treatment_ivosidenib and treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine in their joint effect on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_midostaurin*treatment_7plus3: int_coef=-0.020 (p=0.752).
treatment_gilteritinib*treatment_7plus3: int_coef=0.024 (p=0.71).
treatment_ivosidenib*treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine: int_coef=-0.059 (p=0.493).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a full multivariable logistic model with all targeted-therapy x mutation interactions, the treatment_midostaurin:flt3_itd interaction term is positive and significant.
In the full multivariable model, the treatment_gilteritinib:flt3_itd interaction term is positive and significant.
In the full multivariable model, the treatment_gilteritinib:flt3_tkd interaction term is positive and significant.
In the full multivariable model, the treatment_ivosidenib:idh1_mutation interaction term is positive and significant.
In the full multivariable model, the treatment_enasidenib:idh2_mutation interaction term is positive and significant.

analyses.result_summary: Full multivariable interaction term treatment_midostaurin:flt3_itd: coef=-0.116 (OR=0.891), p=0.166.
Full multivariable interaction term treatment_gilteritinib:flt3_itd: coef=0.052 (OR=1.054), p=0.524.
Full multivariable interaction term treatment_gilteritinib:flt3_tkd: coef=-0.206 (OR=0.814), p=0.178.
Full multivariable interaction term treatment_ivosidenib:idh1_mutation: coef=-0.328 (OR=0.720), p=0.0596.
Full multivariable interaction term treatment_enasidenib:idh2_mutation: coef=0.028 (OR=1.029), p=0.849.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for demographics, ecog_ps and other labs, higher albumin_g_dl is independently associated with higher odds of objective_response (positive coefficient).
After adjustment, higher ldh_u_l is independently associated with lower odds of objective_response (negative coefficient).
After adjustment, higher crp_mg_l is independently associated with lower odds of objective_response.
After adjustment, higher nlr is independently associated with lower odds of objective_response.
After adjustment, higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is independently associated with lower odds of objective_response.
After adjustment, higher hemoglobin_g_dl is independently associated with higher odds of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted logit coefficient for albumin_g_dl: 0.1191 (OR per +1=1.126), p=2.43e-07.
Adjusted logit coefficient for ldh_u_l: -0.0001 (OR per +1=1.000), p=0.351.
Adjusted logit coefficient for crp_mg_l: -0.0066 (OR per +1=0.993), p=3.09e-06.
Adjusted logit coefficient for nlr: 0.0000 (OR per +1=1.000), p=0.995.
Adjusted logit coefficient for weight_loss_pct_6mo: -0.0358 (OR per +1=0.965), p=1.75e-30.
Adjusted logit coefficient for hemoglobin_g_dl: -0.0075 (OR per +1=0.993), p=0.243.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL PINNED: treatment_gilteritinib increases objective_response within the subgroup defined by flt3_itd=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 (TP53 mutation and complex karyotype hypothesised to suppress benefit).

FINAL PINNED: treatment_midostaurin increases objective_response within the subgroup defined by flt3_itd=1 AND unfit_for_intensive=0 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 (unfitness, TP53 mutation and complex karyotype hypothesised to suppress benefit).

FINAL PINNED: treatment_ivosidenib increases objective_response within the subgroup defined by idh1_mutation=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 (TP53 and complex karyotype hypothesised to suppress benefit).

FINAL PINNED: treatment_enasidenib increases objective_response within the subgroup defined by idh2_mutation=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 (TP53 and complex karyotype hypothesised to suppress benefit).

FINAL PINNED (intermediate): treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine increases objective_response within the subgroup defined by unfit_for_intensive=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0; this captures most of the venetoclax-azacitidine benefit but the effect is further concentrated when npm1_mutation=1 (see h158).

FINAL PINNED: treatment_7plus3 increases objective_response within the subgroup defined by unfit_for_intensive=0 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 (unfitness, TP53 and complex karyotype hypothesised to suppress benefit).

FINAL PINNED (most refined): treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine dramatically increases objective_response within the subgroup defined by unfit_for_intensive=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 AND npm1_mutation=1. Suppressors of benefit: TP53 mutation, complex karyotype; NPM1-wildtype within the otherwise-eligible group also abolishes benefit (h159).

Within unfit_for_intensive=1 AND tp53_mutation=0 AND complex_karyotype=0 AND npm1_mutation=0 patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1 does NOT produce a meaningful difference in objective_response vs treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0 (negative control showing NPM1+ is required for benefit).

Final pinned: treatment_enasidenib within [idh2_mutation=1 & tp53_mutation=0 & complex_karyotype=0] (n=3577, on=277): on=0.220, off=0.196, Δ=+0.024, OR=1.156.
Final pinned: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine within [unfit_for_intensive=1 & tp53_mutation=0 & complex_karyotype=0] (n=15328, on=6078): on=0.349, off=0.162, Δ=+0.186, OR=2.761.
Final pinned: treatment_7plus3 within [unfit_for_intensive=0 & tp53_mutation=0 & complex_karyotype=0] (n=22993, on=10351): on=0.170, off=0.161, Δ=+0.010, OR=1.073.
